title: cotoneaster cornifolius
intro: Cotoneaster cornifolius, also known as Manchurian cotoneaster, is a type of shrub or small tree that belongs to the Rosaceae family. This plant has been traditionally used in medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which are attributed to its high content of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Cotoneaster cornifolius include its ability to lower blood pressure, improve cardiovascular health, and act as an antiseptic to treat wounds and infections. Herbal preparations of Cotoneaster cornifolius are typically made from its leaves and berries, which can be consumed as teas, infusions, or used in the form of tinctures and extracts.
